subject: [PATCH pynfs 06/13] server41tests: test COPY with bad source stateid

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test to the server41tests suite that verifies the NFSv4 server correctly rejects a COPY operation when the source filehandle's stateid is invalid. The test creates two filehandles, one with an invalid stateid, and then attempts to copy data from the first filehandle to the second. If the server returns NFS4ERR_BAD_STATEID, the test passes; otherwise, it fails.
